title: Collard Greens with Welsh Rarebit
description: A twist on the classic Welsh dish, adding some spicy piquant flavor to the greens.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Blanch the collards for 5 minutes, then drain.
In a skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add 1/4 cup of piquant to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add 1/2 cup of Welsh to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the blanched collards to the skillet and toss to coat with the Welsh Rarebit sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
